member.name: T:PlcCommunication.OperateResult
member.summary: OperateResult is a class that represents the result of an operation. It is not generic.

member.name: T:PlcCommunication.OperateResult`1
member.summary: The generic version inherits from the base class
member.typeparam: The type of the data to return

member.name: T:PlcCommunication.Helpers.PinnedArray`1
member.summary: Represents an array that is pinned in memory, preventing the garbage collector from moving its memory location.
member.typeparam: The type of the elements in the array must be an unmanaged type.

member.name: M:PlcCommunication.Helpers.PinnedArray`1.#ctor(`0[])
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the PinnedArray class.
member.param: The array to pin in memory.

member.name: M:PlcCommunication.Helpers.PinnedArray`1.AddrOfPinnedObject
member.summary: Gets the memory address of the pinned array.
member.returns: The memory address of the pinned array.

member.name: M:PlcCommunication.Helpers.PinnedArray`1.Dispose
member.summary: Disposes of the PinnedArray object.

member.name: M:PlcCommunication.Helpers.PinnedArray`1.Dispose(System.Boolean)
member.summary: Frees the memory used by the pinned array.

member.name: M:PlcCommunication.Helpers.PinnedArray`1.Finalize
member.summary: Destructor, called during garbage collection, releases unmanaged resources.

member.name: T:PlcCommunication.Helpers.UnmanagedPointer
member.summary: Represents a wrapper for an unmanaged memory pointer, responsible for releasing the unmanaged memory and preventing memory leaks.

member.name: P:PlcCommunication.Helpers.UnmanagedPointer.Pointer
member.summary: Gets the unmanaged memory pointer.

member.name: F:PlcCommunication.Helpers.UnmanagedPointer.disposed
member.summary: Used to determine if the object has been disposed.

member.name: M:PlcCommunication.Helpers.UnmanagedPointer.#ctor(System.IntPtr)
member.summary: Init UnmanagedPointer Class.

member.name: M:PlcCommunication.Helpers.UnmanagedPointer.Dispose
member.summary: Frees by UnmanagedPointer all resources occupied.

member.name: M:PlcCommunication.Helpers.UnmanagedPointer.Dispose(System.Boolean)
member.summary: Releases unmanaged resources. Optionally, releases managed resources.
member.param: True to release both managed and unmanaged resources; false to release only unmanaged resources.

member.name: M:PlcCommunication.Helpers.UnmanagedPointer.Finalize
member.summary: Destructor for the UnmanagedPointer class.

member.name: T:PlcCommunication.Implementations.MCProtocol.MCProtocolPlc
member.summary: Mitsubishi MC Protocol PLC implementation

member.summary: Simulated PLC for testing purposes

member.summary: Get all memory contents (for debugging)

member.name: M:PlcCommunication.Implementations.Simulated.SimulatedPlc.ClearMemory
member.summary: Clear all memory

member.name: T:PlcCommunication.Interfaces.IPlcBase
member.summary: Base interface for all PLC communication implementations

member.name: P:PlcCommunication.Interfaces.IPlcBase.Name
member.summary: Gets the name of the PLC instance

member.name: P:PlcCommunication.Interfaces.IPlcBase.IsConnected
member.summary: Gets whether the PLC connection is open

member.name: M:PlcCommunication.Interfaces.IPlcBase.Initialize(System.String)
member.summary: Initialize the PLC with connection parameters
member.param: Connection string containing IP, port, and other parameters

member.name: M:PlcCommunication.Interfaces.IPlcBase.Connect
member.summary: Open connection to the PLC

member.name: M:PlcCommunication.Interfaces.IPlcBase.Disconnect
member.summary: Close connection to the PLC

member.name: M:PlcCommunication.Interfaces.IPlcBase.Read``1(System.String,System.UInt32)
member.summary: Read data from PLC

member.name: M:PlcCommunication.Interfaces.IPlcBase.Read``1(System.String)
member.summary: Read single value from PLC

member.name: M:PlcCommunication.Interfaces.IPlcBase.Write``1(System.String,``0[])
member.summary: Write data to PLC

member.name: M:PlcCommunication.Interfaces.IPlcBase.Write``1(System.String,``0)
member.summary: Write single value to PLC

member.name: M:PlcCommunication.Interfaces.IPlcBase.ReadString(System.String,System.UInt32)
member.summary: Read string from PLC

member.name: M:PlcCommunication.Interfaces.IPlcBase.WriteString(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Write string to PLC

member.summary: Abstract base class for PLC communication implementations

member.summary: Connection string for the PLC

member.summary: Validate address format (can be overridden by derived classes)

member.summary: Log message (can be overridden for custom logging)
